name_en: M25445 Sky Blue Ostrich. Inspired by Louis Vuitton trunks, this Slim Trunk handbag features an ostrich leather body with riveted borders and a metal S-lock, showcasing a rock-chic style. The shiny chain and adjustable leather shoulder strap are detachable, offering versatile carrying options. 23 x 12 x 4 cm (L x H x W)
